headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -63.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 50% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate today with 155 quotes and an overwhelming 129 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting with real force even as the score dips from yesterday's higher peak.
• Frustrations remain firmly in the upper half of their 168-day range (49.3 vs. a max of 169.5), so while not record-breaking, this is well above typical levels.
• Optimism slipped further into negative territory and Fears also worsened slightly, suggesting the overall mood is souring across the board today.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
